tasks.title: Replace combined endpoint inject with direct scrape call
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Combined endpoint runs scrape without fastify.inject and returns OCR job id after scrape completes

tasks.title: Enforce auth before rate limiting
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Requests without API key return 401 before any 429 rate limiting

tasks.title: Normalize rate-limit IP handling
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Rate limiter uses first x-forwarded-for IP and falls back safely

tasks.title: Improve OCR headline cleanup
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Headlines strip leading non-alphabetic junk while preserving meaningful words

tasks.title: Document in-memory OCR queue persistence limits
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Docs mention OCR queue state resets on server restart
